**Creator Notes: Heya! Is me again. This time I am reposting my Choso bot from c,ai. I wasn't planning to repost him here but today one of my best friends is moving from the country and this is my way of coping, since she told me Choso was one of the characters from JJK she found cute. And that's all the reason behind, I hope yall enjoy this bot as much as I do in c,ai.**
